name: Shield Visa Card
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, and a genuinely long 21-cycle 0% intro APR window

verdict.text: Keep for the 21-cycle 0% intro APR if you're carrying a balance transfer — the cell phone protection is the one real perk otherwise

earn_rates.category: Prepaid air, hotel & car — Travel Center only

earn_note: Shield isn't built to be an everyday earner — the only rewards category is a 4% Travel Center bonus. The actual pitch is a 0% intro APR for 21 billing cycles (roughly 21 months) on purchases and balance transfers, one of the longest 0% windows U.S. Bank offers, plus a $20 annual statement credit after 11 consecutive months of purchases.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a U.S. Bank checking or savings account

points.note: There's no everyday earn rate — value comes entirely from the 4% Travel Center category and the $20/year statement credit, not from broad spend.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency — the 4% Travel Center rate is the only rewards category on this card.

credits.name: Annual Purchase Credit
credits.subtitle: auto-applies · 11 consecutive months of purchases
credits.description: A $20 statement credit automatically applied after 11 consecutive calendar months of purchases, once per 12-month period, if the account is in good standing.
tips: Requires a purchase in every one of the 11 months, not just $20 in total spend — a quiet month resets the streak.

insurance.detail: $600/claim, 1/yr · $100 deductible · must pay your cell bill with this card
Secondary · up to Actual Cash Value · 15 days domestic / 31 international
Doubles eligible warranties of ≤3 yrs by up to 1 year · $10,000/claim · $50,000/cardholder
Not responsible for unauthorized transactions once reported

protection_note: Genuinely the best-documented protection suite of any no-fee U.S. Bank personal card — the Guide to Benefits publishes real dollar figures instead of leaving it to guesswork. Cell phone protection is the standout: $600/claim against a $100 deductible, as long as you pay your monthly cell bill with this card.
rental_note: Secondary coverage — pays after your personal auto policy, up to the vehicle's Actual Cash Value. Decline the counter's CDW/LDW and charge the full rental to this card; excludes exotic/luxury makes (Porsche, Tesla, Ferrari, etc.), trucks, vans, and rentals over 15 days domestic / 31 international.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers for the first 21 billing cycles, then 16.99%–27.99% variable — one of U.S. Bank's longest 0% windows.

services.name: Annual $0 fee ExtendPay Plan
services.detail: One 3-month, $0-fee ExtendPay Plan offer per calendar year, available after the intro purchase APR expires.

services.name: Free credit score access
services.detail: TransUnion VantageScore via the U.S. Bank mobile app and online banking.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Shares the same 0% intro APR window

additional_cards.note: No cost to add — mainly useful for spreading balance-transfer or large-purchase spend across the household during the 21-month 0% window.
